title: Advanced Characterization of the Cure Kinetics of a Liquid Encapsulant
description: Liquid encapsulants are versatile packaging materials that provide electrical insulation and mechanical protection for microelectronic devices.
text:
Kotula, A. , Tao, R. , Tu, J. , Lee, Y. and Holmes, G. (2025), Advanced Characterization of the Cure Kinetics of a Liquid Encapsulant, 2025 IEEE 75th Electronic Components and Technology Conference (ECTC), Dallas, TX, US, [online], https://doi.org/10.1109/ECTC51687.2025.00303, https://tsapps.nist.gov/publication/get_pdf.cfm?pub_id=959539 (Accessed March 1, 2026)
